privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a synthetically generated Webots world file injected via setup_task.sh. The robot definition name 'ASV_BATHYMETRY' was confirmed in the generated world. All expected configuration parameters, including output path ('/home/ga/Desktop/asv_configured.wbt'), fluid name ('seawater'), fluid density (1025), viscous resistance (150), and sonar range (50), perfectly match the explicit task description instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py.
